description: Django REST Framework serializers for defect management system, including models for defects, corrective actions, defect history, and workflow statuses.

classes.name: WorkflowStatusSerializer
classes.description: Serializer for WorkflowStatus model, exposing fields like id, code, name, description, and timestamps.

classes.name: FiveWhyAnalysisSerializer
classes.description: Serializer for FiveWhyAnalysis model, including defect_id and root cause analysis fields.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionSerializer
classes.description: Serializer for CorrectiveAction model, with validation to auto-set completed_at when status is done.

classes.name: DefectHistorySerializer
classes.description: Serializer for DefectHistory, including nested status serializers.

classes.name: DefectSerializer
classes.description: Main serializer for Defect model, with nested status, five_why, and actions; includes validation and creation logic.

classes.name: DefectCreateUpdateSerializer
classes.description: Simplified serializer for creating/updating defects, avoiding nested writes.

classes.name: DefectTransitionRequestSerializer
classes.description: Serializer for defect status transition requests, validating to_status_code.

classes.name: DashboardMetricsSerializer
classes.description: Serializer for dashboard metrics, including defect counts and action statuses.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validation method for CorrectiveActionSerializer and DefectSerializer, ensuring data integrity.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new Defect instance with default status and logs creation in DefectHistory.
